description: Knowledge Graph test cases for validation

test_cases.name: Entity extraction from single chunk
test_cases.description: Extract entities from a known chunk about NMT

input_chunk.content: Although Neural Machine Translation (NMT) has dominated recent research on translation tasks, NMT heavily relies on large-scale parallel data, resulting in poor performance on low-resource or zero-resource language pairs.

test_cases.name: Relation extraction from co-occurring entities
test_cases.description: Extract relations between entities in the same section
test_cases.input_context: BERT achieves state-of-the-art results on SQuAD for question answering.

test_cases.name: Entity deduplication
test_cases.description: Merge duplicate entities with different surface forms

test_cases.name: Noise entity filtering
test_cases.description: Remove short, empty, or meaningless entities

test_cases.name: JSON store read/write
test_cases.description: Write graph to JSON and read it back

test_cases.name: One-hop query
test_cases.description: Query one-hop neighbors of a node

test_cases.name: Two-entity path query
test_cases.description: Check if path exists between two entities

test_cases.name: Full pipeline integration
test_cases.description: Run full pipeline on a single document and verify output
